judge_reason: Description A and B describe completely different visual content, names, and captions (e.g., B quotes text about 'Brian Pollock' and 'Kenneth Arnold' while A mentions different newspapers and a different object description).

gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A full newspaper front page collage with multiple UFO-related articles, several embedded black-and-white photographs and cartoons, a large headline “Flying Saucers Are Poppin’ Up All Over,” and a drawn diagram labeled with arrows and “Light” and “antenna.”*
